items.title: Iran says no new commitments on nuclear sites after Vance says inspectors to be invited back
items.summary: Iran's foreign ministry says it made "no new commitments" on nuclear inspections after talks in Switzerland.

items.title: Humans May Have Always Been Able to Regenerate Body Parts–Scar Tissue Just Gets in the Way
items.summary: Some animals like salamanders can regenerate entire limbs, and by flipping a few genetic switches scientists have potentially unlocked innate human regeneration. The key is essentially to deprogram th…
